enonce.texte:
Exercise 1: Match the job with its description.

Relie chaque métier à sa description en anglais.

Bloom's level: Remember (Se souvenir)
images: A collage showing different professionals: a teacher with a chalkboard, a doctor with a stethoscope, a farmer with crops, a shopkeeper at a counter, a nurse in uniform, a driver in a truck

questions.texte: Match the jobs: teacher, doctor, farmer, shopkeeper, nurse, driver
questions.reponse: teacher = teaches students, doctor = treats sick people, farmer = grows crops, shopkeeper = sells goods, nurse = cares for patients, driver = drives vehicles

sousQuestions.texte: Who sells goods in a shop?

enonce.texte:
Exercise 2: Listen to the dialogue and answer the questions.

Écoute le dialogue entre deux amis et réponds aux questions.

Dialogue (Teacher reads aloud):

"Mama: Hello Papa! What do you do?
Papa: I am a teacher. I teach English at the secondary school.
Mama: That's great! I am a nurse. I work at the hospital.
Papa: Do you help sick people?
Mama: Yes, I do. I take care of patients. What about your sister?
Papa: She is a doctor. She works at the clinic near our house.
Mama: That's wonderful!"

Bloom's level: Understand (Comprendre)
images: Two people talking in a friendly setting, one holding a book (teacher), the other wearing a nurse uniform

questions.texte: Answer the questions based on the dialogue.

sousQuestions.reponse: He is a teacher. He teaches English at a secondary school.
She is a nurse. She works at the hospital.
She is a doctor. She works at the clinic near their house.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 3: Read the job advertisement and answer the questions.

Lis l'annonce d'emploi et réponds aux questions.

Advertisement:

👨‍⚕️ JOB VACANCY

Position: Nurse
Location: Central Hospital, Yaoundé
Working hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM - 4:00 PM
Salary: 300,000 FCFA per month
Requirements: Must have a nursing diploma, must be able to work with patients, must be kind and patient
How to apply: Send your CV to the hospital director

Bloom's level: Analyze (Analyser)
images: A formal job advertisement poster with the text described above, showing a hospital building icon and a nurse silhouette

questions.texte: Read the advertisement and answer the questions.

sousQuestions.reponse: The job offered is a nurse.
The hospital is located in Yaoundé.

sousQuestions.texte: How much is the salary per month?
sousQuestions.reponse: The salary is 300,000 FCFA per month.

sousQuestions.texte: What qualifications does a nurse need?
sousQuestions.reponse: A nurse must have a nursing diploma, must be able to work with patients, and must be kind and patient.

sousQuestions.texte: How can you apply for this job?
sousQuestions.reponse: You can apply by sending your CV to the hospital director.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 4: Read the conversation and complete the sentences.

Lis la conversation entre un parent et un enfant et complète les phrases.

Conversation:

"Maman: My son, what do you want to be when you grow up?
Jean: I want to be a doctor. I can help sick people.
Maman: That's a good job! Doctors work in hospitals.
Jean: Yes, I know. A doctor can save lives.
Maman: What does your father do?
Jean: He is a farmer. He grows crops on the farm.
Maman: That's a very important job too!"

Bloom's level: Understand (Comprendre) and Apply (Appliquer)
images: A mother talking to her son, with a child thinking about becoming a doctor and a farm scene in the background

questions.texte: Complete the sentences based on the conversation.

sousQuestions.texte: A farmer ______ crops on the farm.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 5: Listen to the descriptions and identify the jobs.

Écoute les descriptions et identifie de quel métier il s'agit.

Bloom's level: Understand (Comprendre) and Analyze (Analyser)
images: A collage showing various professionals in different work environments: a teacher in a classroom, a doctor in a hospital, a farmer in a field, a shopkeeper in a store

questions.texte: Listen and identify the job described.

sousQuestions.texte: This person teaches students at school. Who is it?
This person works in a hospital and treats sick people. Who is it?
This person grows crops and raises animals on a farm. Who is it?
This person sells goods in a shop or market. Who is it?

enonce.texte:
Exercise 6: Read the text and answer the questions.

Lis le texte sur les métiers et réponds aux questions.

Text:

"Different Jobs in Our Community

There are many important jobs in our community. Teachers work in schools. They teach children and help them learn. Doctors and nurses work in hospitals. They take care of sick people. Farmers work on farms. They grow food for everyone. Shopkeepers work in shops and markets. They sell food and other things. Police officers keep people safe. Drivers drive cars and trucks to take people and goods from one place to another. Every job is important!"

Bloom's level: Analyze (Analyser) and Evaluate (Évaluer)
images: A community scene showing different professionals in their work settings: a school, a hospital, a farm, a shop, a police station, and a road with vehicles

questions.texte: Read the text and answer the questions.

sousQuestions.reponse: Teachers work in schools. They teach children and help them learn.

sousQuestions.texte: Where do doctors and nurses work?
sousQuestions.reponse: Doctors and nurses work in hospitals.
Shopkeepers sell food and other things.

sousQuestions.texte: Why are all jobs important according to the text?
sousQuestions.reponse: Because every job helps the community in different ways.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 7: Match the job with the tools they use.

Relie chaque métier aux outils ou équipements qu'il utilise.

Bloom's level: Remember (Se souvenir) and Understand (Comprendre)
images: Various tools: a stethoscope, a chalkboard, a hoe/shovel, a shop counter with a cash register, a nurse's cap, a steering wheel

questions.texte: Match the job with its tools.
questions.reponse: teacher = chalkboard, doctor = stethoscope, farmer = hoe/shovel, shopkeeper = cash register, nurse = nurse's cap, driver = steering wheel

sousQuestions.texte: What tool does a doctor use to check your heart?
What does a teacher use to write on?
What does a farmer use to dig the soil?

enonce.texte:
Exercise 8: Write about your dream job.

Écris un paragraphe de 5-6 phrases sur le métier de tes rêves.

Utilise les éléments suivants :

  • What is your dream job?
  • What do you do in this job?
  • Where do you work?
  • Why do you like this job?
  • What do you need to do this job?

Bloom's level: Create (Créer)
images: A child dreaming about different career options, with thought bubbles showing a doctor, a teacher, a pilot, and a firefighter

questions.texte: Write 5-6 sentences about your dream job.
questions.reponse: Example answer: My dream job is to be a doctor. I want to help sick people. I will work in a hospital. I like this job because I can save lives. To be a doctor, I need to study hard and go to medical school.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 9: Read the advertisement and answer true or false.

Lis l'annonce pour un poste d'enseignant et dis si les affirmations sont vraies ou fausses.

Advertisement:

📚 TEACHER WANTED

School: Excellence Academy, Douala
Subject: English
Salary: 350,000 FCFA per month
Requirements: Must have a degree in English, must be patient, must have experience
Benefits: Free lunch, health insurance
Contact: Call 699-888-777

Bloom's level: Analyze (Analyser)
images: A professional job advertisement poster showing a school building, with the text described above

questions.texte: Read the advertisement and say if the statements are true or false.

sousQuestions.reponse: False. The school is in Douala.

sousQuestions.texte: The salary is 350,000 FCFA per month.
The teacher must have a degree in English.
To apply, you must send an email.
sousQuestions.reponse: False. To apply, you must call 699-888-777.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 10: Listen to the job interview and complete the form.

Écoute l'entretien d'embauche et remplis la fiche de renseignements.

Interview (Teacher reads aloud):

"Interviewer: Good morning. What is your name?
Candidate: My name is Paul Messi.
Interviewer: What do you do?
Candidate: I am a driver. I have a driver's license.
Interviewer: How long have you been driving?
Candidate: I have been driving for five years.
Interviewer: Can you drive a truck?
Candidate: Yes, I can.
Interviewer: What languages do you speak?
Candidate: I speak English and French.
Interviewer: When can you start?
Candidate: I can start next Monday."

Bloom's level: Understand (Comprendre) and Create (Créer)
images: A job interview scene with an interviewer and a candidate sitting at a table, with papers and forms on the table

questions.texte: Complete the job application form based on the interview.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 11: Complete the sentences with the correct job words.

Complète les phrases avec les mots de métiers donnés.

Mots à utiliser : doctor, teacher, farmer, shopkeeper, nurse, driver, police officer

Bloom's level: Apply (Appliquer)

questions.texte: Complete the sentences with the correct job word.

sousQuestions.texte: A ______ grows crops on a farm.
A ______ treats sick people in a hospital.
A ______ sells goods in a shop.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 12: Listen to the descriptions and answer the questions.

Écoute les descriptions des métiers et réponds aux questions.

Bloom's level: Understand (Comprendre) and Analyze (Analyser)
images: A scene showing different professionals: a police officer, a firefighter, a teacher, and a mechanic

questions.texte: Listen and answer the questions about each job.

sousQuestions.texte: What job grows food for everyone?
What job takes care of sick people?
